description: The CircleSegmentShaderMesh creates a single quad that covers the bounding box area of a flat torus circle defined by the given values. This is used to render the UI_CircleSegment material.

fields.RadiusStart: The inner radius of the circle
fields.Thickness: How thick the circle is outwards from the inner radius
fields.AngleStart: What angle the circle starts at in degrees
fields.ArcLength: The amount of degrees of the circle arch
fields.FillColor: Used to color the vertices of the mesh (vertex colors)
fields.BorderColor: The border color the Component:UI_CircleSegment rendering on this mesh.
fields.BorderSize: The border thickness of the Component:UI_CircleSegment rendering on this mesh.
fields.RoundedCornerRadius: The radius of the corner rounding of the Component:UI_CircleSegment rendering on this mesh.

usage: Used as a mesh to render the UI_CircleSegment material.
